sources: PLOS One 2024 - Penalty shootouts alternating order study
Northwestern Sports Analytics - World Cup penalty data
Bruin Sports Analytics - Penalty placement math
MDPI Symmetry 2025 - Laterality and shot direction in elite football

rightFoot.notes: Right-footers favour bottom-left (natural side) ~38%. Data from MDPI laterality study + Bruin Sports Analytics.

leftFoot.notes: Left-footers mirror right-foot distribution. Natural side is bottom-right ~38%.

rightHanded.notes: Keepers favour diving low. Slight bias to their left (taker's right). ResearchGate dive direction study.

zoneSaveDifficulty.notes: Base save chance when keeper dives to correct zone. Upper third ~9.1% per PLOS One. Medium height ~33.5%.
